item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by MiniMax,Hailuo AI

item.title: Amazon Nova Canvas (Amazon)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Amazon

item.title: Luma Photon Flash (LumaLabs)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by LumaLabs

item.title: Poolside Malibu (Poolside)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Poolside

item.title: YuLan-Mini (Renmin)
item.description: Parameters: YuLan-Mini License: open Type: model "1.08T tokens for training. Among them are 481B English web data, 138B general English knowledge, 227B code pre-training data, 16.7B code instruction data, 93.8B mathematics pre-training data, 15.5B mathematics instruction data, and 108B Chinese data."

item.title: DeepSeek-V3 (DeepSeek-AI)
item.description: Parameters: DeepSeek-V3 License: open Type: model 37B active. Explain: https://threadreaderapp.com/thread/1872318161883959485.html Announce: https://github.com/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3?tab=readme-ov-file

item.title: EON-8B (LinkedIn)
item.description: Parameters: EON-8B License: closed Type: model "We found the EON-8B model (a domain-adapted Llama 3.1-8B variant) to be 75x and 6x cost effective in comparison to GPT-4 and GPT-4o respectively (Figure 4)... On tasks seen during training, the EON-8B model outperformed base Llama-3-8B-Instruct and its performance was comparable to SOTA GPT models."

item.title: o3-preview (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: o3-preview License: open Type: model SoTA model for Dec/2024. Parameter estimate is very rough centrepoint for range 400B-52T.

item.title: RWKV-7 Goose (RWKV)
item.description: Parameters: RWKV-7 Goose License: open Type: model RWKV (pronounced RwaKuv) is an RNN: "multilingual, supporting over 100 languages and code.". Full run is 332B tokens of 3.1T dataset.

item.title: ModernBERT (International)
item.description: Parameters: ModernBERT License: open Type: model "a proper workhorse model, for retrieval, classification, etc." https://bsky.app/profile/howard.fm/post/3ldod2afps62x

item.title: Granite 3.1 8B (IBM)
item.description: Parameters: Granite 3.1 8B License: open Type: model

item.title: Bamba-9B (IBM)
item.description: Parameters: Bamba-9B License: open Type: model "trained by IBM, Princeton, CMU, and UIUC on completely open data. At inference time, the model demonstrates 2.5x throughput improvement and 2x latency speedup compared to standard transformers in vLLM."

item.title: o1-2024-12-17 (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: o1-2024-12-17 License: closed Type: model "o1-2024-12-17 sets new state-of-the-art results on several benchmarks, improving cost-efficiency and performance."

item.title: Falcon 3 (TII)
item.description: Parameters: Falcon 3 License: open Type: model "We conducted a single large-scale pretraining run on the 7B model, using 1024 H100 GPU chips, leveraging 14 trillion tokens... upscaled the 7B model to a 10B parameters model by duplicating the redundant layers and continuing pre-training with 2 trillion tokens of high-quality data."

item.title: Command R7B (Cohere)
item.description: Parameters: Command R7B License: open Type: model

item.title: Maya (Cohere)
item.description: Parameters: Maya License: open Type: model VLM.

item.title: BLT (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: BLT License: open Type: model Byte Latent Transformer (BLT), a new byte-level LLM architecture that, for the first time, matches tokenization-based LLM performance

item.title: Large Concept Model (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: Large Concept Model License: open Type: model "autoregressive sentence prediction in an embedding space." 7.7T tokens is a misprint, should be 2.2T as in paper.

item.title: Phi-4 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: Phi-4 License: open Type: model Use unsloth: https://huggingface.co/unsloth/phi-4-GGUF & https://www.reddit.com/r/singularity/comments/1i0kso4/i_fixed_4_bugs_in_microsofts_opensource_phi4_model/

item.title: Gemini 2.0 Flash exp (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: Gemini 2.0 Flash exp License: open Type: model Gemini 2.0 Flash was first model released, 11/Dec/2024. "New Modalities: Gemini 2.0 introduces native image generation and controllable text-to-speech capabilities" Announce: https://blog.google/technology/google-deepmind/google-gemini-ai-update-december-2024/ Note: Gemini outputs are watermarked. I do not use GDM models. https://lifearchitect.ai/watermarking/

item.title: Moxin-7B (International)
item.description: Parameters: Moxin-7B License: open Type: model "Fully Open Source" with pre-training code, configurations, training and fine-tuning datasets, and intermediate checkpoints.

item.title: 1T (Cerebras)
item.description: Parameters: 1T License: closed Type: model "For Sandia’s trillion parameter training run, Cerebras configured a 55 terabyte MemoryX device."

item.title: InternVL 2.5 (Shanghai AI Laboratory/SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: InternVL 2.5 License: open Type: model Benchmarks are estimates based on Qwen2.5 72B Instruct as the base LLM (InternVL 2.5=InternViT-6B-448px-V2.5 5.5B + Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct). "Notably, Qwen2-VL processed a cumulative total of 1.4T tokens, while our InternVL2.5-78B is trained on just ∼120B tokens [of vision]."Dataset... we identify repetitive generation as one of the most detrimental issues. In many open-source or synthetic datasets, a small number of repetitive samples—comprising merely thousands of examples in our Stage 2 data mixture—can cause the model to spiral into repetitive loops, particularly in long-form outputs or CoT reasoning tasks. This phenomenon undermines the effectiveness of test-time scaling strategies. To address this challenge and support future research, we designed an efficient data filtering pipeline to remove low-quality samples, thereby minimizing the risk of repetitive generation." Repo: https://github.com/OpenGVLab/InternVL

item.title: Llama 3.3 (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: Llama 3.3 License: open Type: model Drop-in replacement for Llama 3.1 70B, comparable performance to Llama 3.1 405B.

item.title: EXAONE-3.5 (LG)
item.description: Parameters: EXAONE-3.5 License: open Type: model “EXAONE”=“EXpert AI for EveryONE”. Training tokens/ratio dropped from EXAONE-3 7.8B with 8T (Aug/2024) to this (Dec/2024) 7.8B with 9T to 32B with 6.5T.

item.title: Deepthought-8B (Ruliad)
item.description: Parameters: Deepthought-8B License: open Type: model No evals. Llama 3.1 8B base.

item.title: Sailor2 (Sail)
item.description: Parameters: Sailor2 License: open Type: model SEA languages. Continual pretraining based on Qwen2.5. Project page: https://sea-sailor.github.io/blog/sailor2/

item.title: Pleias 1.0 (PleIAs)
item.description: Parameters: Pleias 1.0 License: open Type: model Trained on the Jean Zay supercomputer, 192x H100s for 20 days. Dataset is new CC + Synthetic: https://huggingface.co/datasets/PleIAs/common_corpus

item.title: o1 (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: o1 License: open Type: model "a version of our most intelligent model that thinks longer for the most reliable responses" System card about safety only: https://cdn.openai.com/o1-system-card-20241205.pdf

item.title: Nova Pro (Amazon)
item.description: Parameters: Nova Pro License: open Type: model Multimodal, same performance as Llama 3.2 90B ∴ est 90B. Model card was hidden: https://assets.amazon.science/9f/a3/ae41627f4ab2bde091f1ebc6b830/the-amazon-nova-family-of-models-technical-report-and-model-card.pdf via https://www.amazon.science/publications/the-amazon-nova-family-of-models-technical-report-and-model-card

item.title: EuroLLM (Consortium)
item.description: Parameters: EuroLLM License: open Type: model 24 official languages are Bulgarian, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hungarian, Irish, Italian, Latvian, Lithuanian, Maltese, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Slovak, Slovenian, Spanish, and Swedish. "we use 400 Nvidia H100 GPUs of the Marenostrum 5 supercomputer" Also: https://eurollm.io/

item.title: DisTrO 15B (Nous Research)
item.description: Parameters: DisTrO 15B License: open Type: model "About 14 DGXes scattered around the globe. Sometimes more sometimes less, it varies depending on availability. On average, around 112 H100s." https://x.com/bloc97_/status/1863675225810043331 "we introduce DisTrO, a family of architecture-agnostic and network-agnostic distributed optimizers that reduces the inter-GPU communication requirements by four to five orders of magnitude without relying on amortized analysis, enabling low-latency training of large neural networks on slow internet bandwidths with heterogeneous networking hardware."

item.title: RNAformer (University of Freiburg)
item.description: Parameters: 32M License: closed Type: model AI model by University of Freiburg

item.title: INTELLECT-1 (Prime Intellect,Hugging Face,Arcee AI)
item.description: Parameters: 10B License: closed Type: model AI model by Prime Intellect,Hugging Face,Arcee AI

item.title: KwooVa (Harbin Institute of Technology)

item.title: KwooLa (Harbin Institute of Technology)
item.description: Parameters: 14B License: closed Type: model AI model by Harbin Institute of Technology

item.title: KwooGr (Harbin Institute of Technology)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Harbin Institute of Technology

item.title: INTELLECT-1 (Prime Intellect)
item.description: Parameters: INTELLECT-1 License: open Type: model Training complete 22/Nov/2024. Fully distributed training: "the first decentralized training run of a 10-billion-parameter model, inviting anyone to contribute compute and participate. This brings us one step closer towards open source AGI."

item.title: QwQ-32B-Preview (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: QwQ-32B-Preview License: open Type: model Scores 1/5 on latest ALPrompt 2024 H2. Qwen with Question=QwQ

item.title: Teuken-7B (OpenGPT-X)
item.description: Parameters: Teuken-7B License: open Type: model 24 EU languages (60% non-English): bg, cs, da, de, el, en, es, et, fi, fr, ga, hr, hu, it, lt, lv, mt, nl, pl, pt, ro, sk, sl, sv. https://opengpt-x.de/models/teuken-7b-de/ & paper date is Sep/2024.

item.title: OLMo 2 (Allen AI)
item.description: Parameters: OLMo 2 License: open Type: model Open Language Model (OLMo) 2 Apache 2.0 license for research and educational use. Paper coming. Data: 5 trillion tokens (1.2 epochs of 4T tokens) + 100B tokens (3 runs) + 300B tokens (1 run) merged. https://huggingface.co/allenai/OLMo-2-1124-13B & playground: https://playground.allenai.org/

item.title: Bi-Mamba (CMU)
item.description: Parameters: Bi-Mamba License: closed Type: model Unreleased, but will be replicated. "a scalable and powerful 1-bit Mamba architecture designed for more efficient large language models"

item.title: k0-math (Moonshot AI)
item.description: Parameters: k0-math License: open Type: model Reasoning, maths only. Very little info available. Chinese. Long context. No paper.

item.title: Marco-o1 (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: Marco-o1 License: open Type: model No evals. Qwen2-7B-Instruct with a combination of the filtered Open-O1 CoT dataset, Marco-o1 CoT dataset, and Marco-o1 Instruction dataset.

item.title: TÜLU 3 (Allen AI)
item.description: Parameters: TÜLU 3 License: open Type: model Llama 3.1 post-training, worse performance on most benchmarks. Post training methods include new Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR). "We perform supervised fine-tuning on new capability-focused synthetic data mixed with existing instruction datasets. We then perform preference tuning on on-policy synthetic preference data. We finish training Llama Tülu3 with our new method, Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards."

item.title: gpt-4o-2024-11-20 (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: gpt-4o-2024-11-20 License: open Type: model Material decrease in benchmark scores (GPQA: -13.37%, MMLU: -3.38%) compared to Aug/2024. Pruned? Quantized? https://github.com/openai/simple-evals

item.title: DeepSeek-R1-Lite (DeepSeek-AI)
item.description: Parameters: DeepSeek-R1-Lite License: open Type: model Scores 0/5 on latest ALPrompt 2024 H2 "DeepSeek-R1-Lite is currently still in the iterative development stage. It currently only supports web usage and does not support API calls. The base model used by DeepSeek-R1-Lite is also a relatively small model, unable to fully unleash the potential of long reasoning chains. At present, we are continuously iterating on the inference series models. In the future, the official DeepSeek-R1 model will be fully open-sourced. We will publicly release the technical report and deploy API services." https://mp-weixin-qq-com.translate.goog/s/e1YnTxZlzFvjcmrLLTA8fw?_x_tr_sl=zh-CN&_x_tr_tl=en&_x_tr_hl=zh-TW

item.title: Xmodel-LM (XiaoduoAI)
item.description: Parameters: Xmodel-LM License: open Type: model SLM

item.title: Pixtral Large (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: Pixtral Large License: open Type: model Open-weights multimodal model built on top of Mistral Large 2.

item.title: f1 (Fireworks)
item.description: Parameters: f1 License: open Type: model "a compound AI model specialized in complex reasoning, that interweaves multiple open models at the inference layer. "

item.title: Qwen2.5-Coder (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: Qwen2.5-Coder License: open Type: model https://qwenlm.github.io/blog/qwen2.5-coder-family/ Jack Clark from Anthropic is saying it’s actually 18T tokens from Qwen2.5 + 5.5T tokens for a total of 23.5T tokens. That doesn’t seem right from my interpretation of the technical report.

item.title: Fox-1 (TensorOpera)
item.description: Parameters: Fox-1 License: open Type: model Gold standard for dataset documentation

item.title: Hunyuan-Large (Tencent)
item.description: Parameters: Hunyuan-Large License: open Type: model Hunyuan-Large is pre-trained on 7T tokens, which contains nearly 1.5T tokens of high-quality and diverse synthetic data.' '389 billion parameters and 52 billion activation parameters, capable of handling up to 256K tokens'

item.title: SEA-LIONv3 (AI Singapore)
item.description: Parameters: SEA-LIONv3 License: open Type: model SEA-LION is a collection of Large Language Models (LLMs) which has been pretrained and instruct-tuned for the Southeast Asia (SEA) region. The Gemma2 9B CPT SEA-LIONv3 base model which has undergone continued pre-training from the base Gemma-2-9B model. SEA-LION stands for Southeast Asian Languages In One Network.' News: https://www.techinasia.com/news/ai-singapore-boosts-sea-ai-sealion-v3-model

item.title: AMD OLMo (AMD)
item.description: Parameters: AMD OLMo License: open Type: model 1 billion parameter LMs trained from scratch using 1.3T tokens on a cluster of AMD Instinct MI250 GPUs.

item.title: SmolLM2 (Hugging Face)
item.description: Parameters: SmolLM2 License: open Type: model Base and instruct versions, with Apache 2.0 license

item.title: FvFold (Jeonbuk National University)
item.description: Parameters: 9.2M License: open Type: model AI model by Jeonbuk National University
